testPlan.summary: Test Plan LC3-15647 - VV Release Verification
testPlan.description:
This Test Plan covers VV (Formal Verification) for LC3 Release 15647.

Execution Requirements:
- 1 Test Execution per Test Protocol
- Executions must be performed separately for each Test Level (Dev / IV / VV)
- Evidence must be attached per execution
- Execution summary format must be:
  "Test Execution for Test Plan LC3-15647 | <Protocol Name>"

This Test Plan contains 4 Test Protocols.

protocols.description:
## Test Objective
Verify CAPI API correctly deletes user data and returns proper status codes for valid and invalid delete requests.

## Test Code Location
https://github.com/EliLillyCo/PDS_LC3_VERIFICATION_TESTS/tree/develop/lc3-component-tests/delete-user

## Protocol Library
Collection File:
CAPI_API_Delete_User.postman_collection.json

Environment File:
LC3_Formal.postman_environment.json

Newman Command Template:
newman run CAPI_API_Delete_User.postman_collection.json -e LC3_Formal.postman_environment.json --insecure --ignore-redirects --reporters html,json --reporter-html-export CAPI_API_Delete_User_Results.html --reporter-json-export CAPI_API_Delete_User_Results.json

Evidence Checklist:
- newman -v output (text file)
- HTML report
- JSON report
- Metadata file (commit SHA, branch, timestamp, level)

## Required Environment Variables
1. tenantId
2. CAPI_DSAR_Client_Id
3. CAPI_DSAR_Scope
4. CAPI_DSAR_Client_Secret
5. invalid_CAPI_DSAR_Token
6. expired_CAPI_DSAR_Token

## Execution Steps
Step 1 – Verify Newman version
Step 2 – Run Newman command
Step 3 – Validate zero failures
Step 4 – Attach evidence
Step 5 – Mark execution Passed or Failed

## Expected Result
0 Failures for:
- Requests
- Pre-request Scripts
- Test Scripts
- Assertions
- Total Failures

## Objective Evidence
- newman_version.txt
- CAPI_API_Delete_User_Results.html
- CAPI_API_Delete_User_Results.json
- run_metadata.json
